<script lang="ts">
  import * as InputOTP from "$lib/registry/ui/input-otp/index.js"
</script>

<InputOTP.Root maxlength={6}>
  {#snippet children({ cells })}
    <InputOTP.Group>
      {#each cells.slice(0, 2) as cell (cell)}
        <InputOTP.Slot {cell} />
      {/each}
    </InputOTP.Group>
    <InputOTP.Separator />
    <InputOTP.Group>
      {#each cells.slice(2, 4) as cell (cell)}
        <InputOTP.Slot {cell} />
      {/each}
    </InputOTP.Group>
    <InputOTP.Separator />
    <InputOTP.Group>
      {#each cells.slice(4, 6) as cell (cell)}
        <InputOTP.Slot {cell} />
      {/each}
    </InputOTP.Group>
  {/snippet}
</InputOTP.Root>
